posts.title: Why I Switched to TypeScript (and Never Looked Back)
posts.content: After years of writing JavaScript, I finally gave TypeScript a serious try. The type safety alone saved me hours of debugging. In this post, I share my top 5 reasons for the switch, how I migrated a large codebase, and the tools that made the transition smooth. Whether you're a beginner or a seasoned dev, TypeScript is worth the investment.

comments.content: I've been on the fence, but your post convinced me to try it. Any recommendation for a starter project?
Great read! I love how you explained the 'any' escape hatch – that's where I always get stuck.

posts.title: The Art of Mindful Remote Work
posts.content: Working from home is a blessing, but it can also be a trap for burnout. I've learned to set boundaries, create a dedicated workspace, and incorporate short meditation breaks. In this article, I share practical tips that have boosted my productivity and mental health – from digital detox to the Pomodoro technique. Working remotely doesn't mean working all the time.

comments.content: Excellent advice! I started using the Forest app to stay focused, and it helped a lot.
I needed this. Any tips for dealing with noisy roommates? 😅

posts.title: How to Build a Personal Brand on Social Media (Without Feeling Fake)
posts.content: Building a personal brand doesn't have to be cringe. I've grown my online presence authentically by sharing my real journey – the wins and the failures. In this post, I break down a simple framework: find your niche, tell stories, engage genuinely, and be consistent. You don't need millions of followers; you just need the right ones.

comments.content: Love this! I've been struggling with imposter syndrome. How do you handle negative comments?

posts.title: The Rise of AI in Everyday Life – A Beginner's Guide
posts.content: AI is everywhere, but it doesn't have to be intimidating. From smart assistants to personalized recommendations, I explain how AI works under the hood, the ethical questions we face, and how you can leverage AI tools to boost your daily productivity. No math degree required – just curiosity.

posts.title: Top 5 Books That Changed My Perspective on Life
posts.content: Reading is my superpower. These five books – spanning philosophy, psychology, and fiction – reshaped how I view success, relationships, and happiness. I share my key takeaways and why each one is a must-read. If you're looking for a transformative read, start with this list.

comments.content: I've read three of these – adding the others to my list! Thanks for sharing.
